title: Authenticate to the Cove API
description: Describes how to generate API credentials, exchange them for OAuth 2.0 access tokens, and store both securely.

title: Cove Commerce accelerator for Meridian OMS
description: Describes the architecture, modules, and deployment of a pre-built integration between an enterprise OMS and a commerce and fulfillment platform.

title: Update subresource integrity hash values for scripts in the Cove cartridge
description: Describes how to regenerate Subresource Integrity (SRI) hash values after changes to checkout cartridge files.
